description: Always use Desktop Commander for file system operations, configuration checks, and system interactions

syntax_rules.check_files: Always use desktop-commander:read_file or list_directory instead of assuming file locations
syntax_rules.absolute_paths: Always use absolute paths with Desktop Commander unless user explicitly requests relative paths
syntax_rules.search_before_assume: Use desktop-commander:start_search to find files before assuming their locations

preferences.file_operations: use desktop-commander for all file reads, writes, searches, and directory operations
preferences.config_checks: use desktop-commander to check Claude Desktop settings and configurations
preferences.process_management: use desktop-commander for running processes and checking system status

auto_corrections.check configuration: use desktop-commander:read_file to check Claude Desktop configuration

actions.message: Desktop Commander is available for all file system and configuration operations
